name: LinkedIn
signal: Santander & Mastercard Pilot AI Agents for Independent Payments
brief: Santander and Mastercard are piloting AI agents capable of independently executing payments. This marks a significant step towards autonomous financial services, potentially reshaping how users interact with banking and payments. Product managers should monitor the development and adoption of such AI-driven financial agents.

brief: Google AI Studio has released full-stack AI app development tools, including backend integration and agent workflows. Product managers should explore how GenAI can be leveraged to innovate and solve complex problems in their respective industries.

Product managers should consider the security implications and solutions required for AI agent environments.
